DataRequest.Name: Multiple Login Failures: Net Device / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects excessive logon failures at a network device - 5 consecutive failures in a 10 minute period. This rule triggers for network devices that report a source IP address.
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: $incidentCount login failures for user $user from $srcIpAddr on network device $destName

SubPattern.name: ExcessNetLoginFailure
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_HostLogonFailure) AND reptDevIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_DEVICE_Network) AND srcIpAddr IS NOT NULL

SubPattern.name: ExcessNetLoginFailure2
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_MultipleHostLogonFailure) AND reptDevIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_DEVICE_Network) AND srcIpAddr IS NOT NULL

IncidentDef.ArgList: srcIpAddr = ExcessNetLoginFailure.srcIpAddr,srcIpAddr = ExcessNetLoginFailure2.srcIpAddr,destName = ExcessNetLoginFailure.reptDevName,destName = ExcessNetLoginFailure2.reptDevName,destIpAddr = ExcessNetLoginFailure.reptDevIpAddr,destIpAddr = ExcessNetLoginFailure2.reptDevIpAddr,user = ExcessNetLoginFailure.user,user = ExcessNetLoginFailure2.user,incidentCount = ExcessNetLoginFailure.COUNT(*),incidentCount = ExcessNetLoginFailure2.COUNT(*)
